raw_consumer_statement:
Dear CFPB Representative, I am submitting this follow-up regarding my complaint against Citi concerning Citi Reference Number # XXXX for disputed XXXX  transactions totaling {$2000.00}. 

Citi denied my dispute by categorizing this matter as a routine money transfer/service issue.

However, my complaint is specifically based on fraud/scam concerns.

My concern is that Citi failed to properly investigate the fraudulent circumstances surrounding these transactions and instead relied primarily on merchant transaction classification.

This dispute involves : - Scam/fraud activity - Merchant misrepresentation concerns- Failure to independently investigate fraud indicators - Lack of proper review under fraud protocols- Incomplete evaluation of consumer protection standards I do not believe Citi adequately addressed whether these transactions were connected to fraudulent or scam-related circumstances.

Consumers should not lose fraud protections simply because the transactions occurred through a money transfer service.

I respectfully request CFPB assistance to ensure Citi : - Reopens my dispute - Conducts a full fraud/scam investigation - Reviews all supporting documentation - Explains why fraud protocols were not properly applied - Provides proper regulatory compliance review This matter is not merely a merchant cancellation or standard service issue.

It is a fraud/scam dispute requiring proper consumer protection review.

Thank you for your assistance and oversight. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX
